title: ophrys holosericea subsp. celiensis
intro: Ophrys holosericea subsp. celiensis, also known as the Celiensis Orchid or Bee Ophrys, is a rare and endemic subspecies of the Ophrys holosericea plant, belonging to the Orchidaceae family and native to Italy. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ophrys holosericea subsp. celiensis are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, although specific preparation methods and dosages may vary depending on the intended use and cultural tradition.
